markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between Boulevard and GrowthX for AI-driven content marketing and SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Boulevard seeks to improve inbound/organic traffic, optimize SEO/AEO, and reduce high cost per lead/account](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end content strategy, creation, and publishing with AI-human hybrid approach](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Initial focus on editorial content (30k strategy sprint, then 15k/mo for 12 months), with potential for programmatic tools later](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [Boulevard plans to publish industry data reports, considering website re-platform (Contentful to Webflow/Sanity)](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)

## Topics

### Boulevard's Current Situation

  - [\~10-year-old company providing booking/POS software for salons, spas, and med spas](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Target: Established businesses with 6-9 professionals, $1M+/year revenue per location](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [\~20% market share in med spas, \~6,000 locations across the US](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [Multiple agencies: content (1-2 posts/week), ads (Meta/Google), Reddit (organic)](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [High cost per lead/account, potential to outgrow current agency capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [End-to-end content partner using proprietary AI platform](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [8-week strategy sprint to develop audience-first artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Daily content publishing capability in growth execution phase](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
  - [Focus on editorial content, expanding to programmatic plays later](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [Emphasis on building trust through high-quality, relevant content](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=1138.0)
  - [Integration with client's workflow (Slack, platform access, review process)](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)

### Content Strategy and Creation Process

  - [Detailed persona/ICP development (pain points, motivations, goals)](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [AI-driven research, fact-checking, and draft creation](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [Human expert involvement for refinement and quality assurance](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [Structured content calendar and collaborative review process](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [Potential for newsletters and data-driven content projects](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)

### Pricing and Next Steps

  - [30k for strategy sprint, 15k/month for growth execution (12-month term)](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [Matt to review deck, ROI projections, and articulate business case to CFO](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Potential November kickoff if moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide case studies and SOW for review](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)

### Website Re-platforming

  - [Boulevard considering move from Contentful to Webflow or Sanity](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - [Planned for end of year, likely hiring specialized agency for migration](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=1843.0)
  - [Need to evaluate platform capabilities for programmatic tools/calculators](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=1878.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send deck, ROI projections, and case studies via shared Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
  - [Matt to review materials and build business case for CFO](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Discuss website re-platforming options and implications for content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call if needed, potentially involving Marcel (GrowthX CEO)](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=1738.0)
  - [GrowthX to investigate Webflow/Sanity capabilities for programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/6Kcd3EbjTzB3Tv2TS6PMVXw_icCGDg5M?tab=summary&timestamp=1878.0)
